topic: 歐洲熱門旅遊國家 + 詞性複習（TJ）
notes:
閱讀 Engoo 文章：Which European countries are most popular with tourists?
重點：學習國家名稱（noun）vs 形容詞（adjective）的差別，複習八大詞性。
🇬🇧 英國：England、Scotland、Wales、Northern Ireland → United Kingdom
📚 八大詞性：Nouns, Verbs, Adjectives, Adverbs, Prepositions, Pronouns, Conjunctions, Interjections

words.ex: Florence has many historic buildings.
You need waterproof shoes for this hike.
We stayed at a beach resort in Mexico.
She showed me the sights in Sydney.
My friend is constantly complaining about her boyfriend.
Overtourism has become a problem in Venice.
Europe is the world's most visited continent.
German culture is very interesting.
British people drink a lot of tea.
Italian food is very popular worldwide.

corrections.right: France and the UK（國名）/ French and British（形容詞）

topic: 《飛吧！熊鷹》紀錄片 + 台灣原住民文化（TJ）
notes:
介紹台灣紀錄片《飛吧！熊鷹》(Fly! Mountain Hawk Eagle)，討論熊鷹生態、瀕危狀況，以及原住民文化與保育的平衡。
💡 老師建議：口語很流暢，要開始注意詞性！
📽️ 老師推薦：Planet Earth（兩季）

words.ex: The wingspan of this eagle is almost 116 cm.
This documentary is about an endangered species.
It's a documentary about eagles in Taiwan.
These eagles are an endangered species.
Indigenous people use feathers to show their royalty.
The feather is just a symbol of royalty.
All proceeds will be used to protect these eagles.
The film's goal is to raise awareness about eagles.
The documentary covers the eagle's lifespan.
Eagles in Taiwan eat flying squirrels.
The Muntjac is a deer species found mainly in Taiwan.
A university teacher is called a professor.

corrections.right: bat（蝙蝠）或 flying squirrel（飛鼠）
feather（羽毛）
They won't attack unless they are hunting.

topic: MBTI、飲食習慣、平行宇宙與人生哲學（Lelo）
notes:
討論素食主義、純素、pescatarian 的差別。聊到 MBTI（Christine: ENTP，Lelo: INFJ）。
💡 金句：It's better with you, not that I can't live without you.
💡 老師建議：在 YouTube 找喜歡主題的英語頻道

words.ex: King oyster mushrooms have a meaty texture.
My grandma is Buddhist and eats vegetarian food.
Someone who eats seafood but not meat is pescatarian.
Vegans don't eat any animal products, including eggs.
Intuitive people tend to think abstractly.
F types tend to have strong empathy for others.
Type A people plan every detail of their trips.
Fortune-telling is popular in Taiwan.
Do you believe in predestination or free will?
Nothing is set in stone — things can always change.
In a parallel universe, another version of you exists.
I feel FOMO knowing another me might be a billionaire.
Codependency means you can't function without someone.
N types in MBTI are known for abstract thinking.
Observant people describe exactly what they see.
A plant-based diet means less meat, more vegetables.
I mostly follow a vegetarian diet.

corrections.right: cry in front of your friends
pescatarian
I mostly follow a vegetarian diet（更自然）

topic: 感官描述、身體特徵詞彙、飲用水文章（Lelo）
notes:
練習描述圖片中人物的外貌特徵。閱讀 Engoo 文章：Drink Tap Water? No Thanks, Say Most Americans。討論台灣過濾水、煮沸習慣。
💡 老師建議：注意詞性（parts of speech），學會描述人的外貌

words.ex: Write an outline before starting your report.
Give me a summary of the main points.
We had a seminar about chemical recycling.
I presented at an international conference.
I sent my resume to the HR department.
When you close your eyes, your other senses are heightened.
He has locs down to his shoulders.
He has a beard and a mustache.
A mustache is the hair above the upper lip.
It's not a dangly earring, it's a stud earring.
In Taiwan, we drink boiled and filtered tap water.
Bottled water may contain microplastics.
According to a survey, 70% prefer bottled water.
I took a sip of water at the start of class.

corrections.wrong: your other sentence will feel more
corrections.right: your other senses are heightened
we communicate in Chinese
south of Taipei

topic: 美容保養、Red Light Therapy（Lisa Levine）
notes: 討論台灣人飛去韓國做醫美的趨勢。閱讀 Engoo 文章：Can Red Light Therapy Help Your Skin？

words.ex: I'm skeptical about whether RLT really works.
Red light therapy helps the skin regenerate.
Some beauty treatments use microneedles on the face.
Apply toner before using a face mask.
RLT is claimed to help reduce acne.
Fine lines and wrinkles can be reduced with RLT.
RLT helps reduce skin inflammation.
RLT can protect hair follicles and reduce hair loss.
Cleanse your face to open up your pores.
RLT improves collagen production for smoother skin.
Near-infrared light can penetrate deeper into skin.
K-pop stars use a lot of cosmetics.

corrections.right: Do you have any recommendations?

notes: 討論清明節（Tomb Sweeping Day）、台灣是多元文化島嶼。分享今年已去了3次國外：日本（滑雪板）、韓國x2。計劃10月去美國公路旅行。

words.ex: They decorated the temple with gemstones.
The temple glistens when the sunlight hits it.
The temples in Thailand are very ornate.
Countries near the equator are always hot.
Taiwan is affected by the monsoon season.
The humidity in Taiwan is very high in summer.
Tomb Sweeping Day is on April 4th in Taiwan.
We pray for our ancestors to bless us.
Carnations are the traditional Mother's Day flower.
Taiwan is a multicultural country.
Going to the temple is part of folk beliefs.
The Thai temple has a beautiful pagoda.
We planned a road trip across the US.
A cold front is moving in this week.
October 10th is Taiwan's national holiday.
We held a ceremony for our grandmother.

corrections.right: it's south of Taipei

topic: League of Legends + Nintendo Museum + 工作介紹（Tutor Juliet + Tiffany）
notes:
介紹工作、討論 LOL 電競比賽、T1 團隊。閱讀 Engoo 文章：New Nintendo Museum Opens in Kyoto。
💡 Hsinchu is south of Taipei（不是 southern Taiwan）

words.ex: I stay in my company's halls of residence during the week.
Many companies have their headquarters in Taipei.
T1 has won six global championships.
The Nintendo Museum has many interactive exhibits.
You can find exhibits from the NES to the Switch there.
Nintendo is one of the most influential gaming companies.
Nintendo has made many different consoles over the years.
You need to enter a lottery three months before visiting.
Hsinchu is south of Taipei, not southern Taiwan.

notes: 在首爾參加 T1 的三天粉絲活動。有點懂韓文所以能幫旁邊的臺灣人翻譯。今天是活動第一天，T1贏了，可以看粉絲見面會。

words.ex: The host of the fan event spoke in Korean.
The event was fun (enjoyable), not just funny (humorous).
I'm sensitive to smells, so I can't have pets.
Ferrets are cute but have a very strong smell.
Fish are vulnerable to temperature changes.

notes: 在機場等飛往韓國的航班。討論韓劇：Squid Game、The Extraordinary Lawyer Woo、Glory。聊到 Justin Bieber 和 Adele 的歌。

words.ex: IU is a versatile actress who can play many different roles.
A woman actor is called an actress.

notes: 清明節假期，在台北奶奶家。討論日本旅遊（去過5次以上）。閱讀 Engoo 文章：Survey Shows Type of Country Japanese People Want。

words.ex: Japan has a world-class rugby team.

topic: 求職對談 + 過去式練習（Kay Sokolowski + TJ）
notes:
和 Kay 進行求職主題英語對談。和 TJ 練習過去式動詞，分享和弟弟去餐廳吃飯、逛 Arcade 的一天。
📌 重要：past tense — eat→ate, go→went, come→came, pick up→picked up

words.ex: The Netherlands is famous for renewable energy.
I want to study renewable energy in the Netherlands.
AI might make some jobs redundant in the future.
I sent my resume to the HR department.
Teaching is a very rewarding job.
After lunch, we went to an arcade to play games.
I picked up my brother at 1 PM.

corrections.wrong: I go to restaurant and have a lunch
corrections.right: I went to the restaurant and had lunch（過去式！）
we played games at an arcade
famous for renewable energy

topic: 眼睫毛、殖民歷史、歐洲旅遊建議（Kristina x3）
notes:
和 Kristina 的系列課程：討論台灣的殖民歷史（西班牙、日本、中國）、DNA測試。歐洲旅遊路線建議：倫敦→阿姆斯特丹→巴黎。
💡 more better → just better（不要加 more）

words.ex: Taiwan has a history of colonisation by Spain and Japan.
My higher nose might be from my indigenous ancestors.
Good hygiene is important for health.
European countries commonly have bidets in bathrooms.
Savory food is salty, as opposed to sweet food.
Working without a contract can be precarious.
Raclette is like cheese fondue but you grill the cheese yourself.
Mille-feuille is a delicious French custard layered cake.
Art therapy helps people express emotions through creativity.
Different cultures have been integrated into Taiwanese society.

corrections.right: better（比較級不加 more）
test the DNA

corrections.wrong: yesterday I go to other city
corrections.right: yesterday I went to another city

topic: 台灣地理、新竹、登山、電玩（Zoe Campbell x2）
notes: 討論台灣的多樣地形（terrain）：海洋、高山、平原、珊瑚礁。台灣有兩個板塊交會（continental plates），所以地震頻繁。介紹阿里山（Alishan）和新竹科技城。

words.ex: Taiwan has diverse terrain—ocean, mountains, and plains.
Taiwan has many different geographical features.

corrections.wrong: we can drive car to go the Ali Mountain
corrections.right: we can drive to Alishan

topic: 初次上課，自我介紹、Universal Studios（Daniel + Jessie Mae + Mik）
notes:
第一次使用 Cambly！自我介紹：產業分析師、新竹、化學背景。去年9月第一次出亞洲（美國 Orlando 出差），去了 Universal Studios 三個主題樂園。今年1月去日本蔵王（Zao）滑雪板。
💡 老師 TJ 提醒：注意過去式，特別是不規則動詞

I'm Taiwanese, born and raised in Hsinchu.

Zao is a famous ski resort in northeastern Japan.
